---
title: "Creating Variables"
format: html
---

I typically create variables in R using **dplyr** from the **tidyverse** package.

-   tidyverse [@tidyverse2019]

## Creating an averaged variable

See the [Data Cleaning: Step-by-Step](data-cleaning-overview.qmd) page for an overview of how to create new, averaged variables (i.e., creating a scale).

See this guide for a much more thorough overview of how to create different types of variables:

-   The R CookBook [@LongTeetor]
